title.subtitle: Wolong's Awakening
title.confirm_new_game:
Start new game?
Your progress is preserved until the next save point.

starter.headline: CHOOSE YOUR STARTER DECK
starter.subtitle: Your race defines your playstyle. This choice is forever!
starter.Pyro_flavor: Your monsters burn the opponent with every summon. Aggressive direct attack.
starter.Dragon_flavor: Mighty dragons with high ATK. Many cannot be targeted by effects.
starter.Phoenix_flavor: Swift fliers weaken all opponent monsters. Nearly unstoppable.
starter.Rock_flavor: Massive defense and strong LP healing. Nearly indestructible.
starter.Plant_flavor: Healing and stamina. Your monsters regenerate again and again.
starter.Warrior_flavor: Permanently strengthen your monsters and dominate the battle.
starter.Spellcaster_flavor: Draw more cards than your opponent and stay in control.
starter.Insect_flavor: Permanently weaken all opponent monsters. Makes strong opponents helpless.
starter.Undead_flavor: Risky but devastating: Enormous damage through dark magic.
starter.Aqua_flavor: Return enemy monsters to the hand and control the field.

opponent.headline: FREE DUEL
opponent.subtitle: Choose your opponent
opponent.none_unlocked: No opponents unlocked yet. Beat them in the campaign first!

save.headline: SAVE POINT
save.backup_warning: New game active — save to overwrite the old state, or go back to cancel.
save.confirm_overwrite: Old game will be overwritten. Continue?

slots.title: SAVE SLOTS
slots.confirm_delete: Delete this save? This cannot be undone.
slots.confirm_overwrite: Overwrite this save with a new game?
slots.no_saves: No save data found. Start a new game!

pack.rarity_desc: 9 Cards · Min. Rare · Increased SR/UR Chance

result.win_desc: You defeated the opponent! Your victory echoes through the Three Kingdoms.
result.lose_desc: You were defeated. But every warrior can learn from a defeat...

game.surrender_confirm: Really surrender? The duel will be counted as a defeat.

card_action.hint_fusion: Choose the second fusion card from your hand.
card_action.hint_spell_own: Choose your own monster as a target.
card_action.hint_trap_opp: Choose an opponent's monster as a target.
card_action.hint_choose_zone: Choose a monster zone to place your card.

campaign.title: Campaign
campaign.gauntlet_warning: This is a gauntlet: {{count}} consecutive duels. You cannot save between fights. Continue?
campaign.story_intro_1: The year is 189 AD. The Han Dynasty crumbles. Warlords carve the empire into bleeding pieces.
campaign.story_intro_2: You are a young scholar at the imperial court — unknown, unremarkable. But the ancient cards sense something within you.
campaign.story_intro_3: So... the cards have chosen another. I have not seen them stir like this in decades.
campaign.story_intro_4: Each card holds the echo of a fallen hero. Their power answers only to those with the will to command it.
campaign.story_intro_5: Come, young one. Let us see if the echoes answer your call.
campaign.duel_7_post_1: Hmph. You fight well for a nameless scholar. But this changes nothing.
campaign.duel_7_post_2: Zhang Jue and his Yellow Turbans march on the capital. You cannot stop what is coming.
campaign.duel_7_post_3: Cao Pi vanishes into the shadows. A foul wind blows from the north...
campaign.duel_8_post_1: Foolish child. The Yellow Sky has already swallowed the heavens!
campaign.duel_8_post_2: Zhang Jue's sorcery is overwhelming. Your cards shatter. Your vision darkens.
campaign.duel_8_post_3: A crack splits the sky — not lightning, but something far older. Time itself tears apart.
campaign.duel_8_post_4: You fall... not to the ground, but through centuries. The stars rearrange above you.
campaign.story_arrival_1: Neon light. Steel towers. The roar of a city that never sleeps.
campaign.story_arrival_2: You awaken in Neo-Shanghai — a city built upon the ruins of forgotten kingdoms, centuries after your own time.
campaign.story_arrival_3: The ancient card arts survive here, reborn as competitive sport. Holographic arenas draw crowds of thousands.
campaign.story_arrival_4: A tournament — the Dragon Gate Cup — promises the winner a single wish. Any wish.
campaign.story_arrival_5: A way home. You must win the Dragon Gate Cup.
campaign.duel_17_post_1: The Dragon Gate Cup is yours. The crowd roars. But the wish you seek cannot be granted by mortals.
campaign.duel_17_post_2: An elder approaches — her eyes ancient beyond her years. She speaks of the Wu-Xing shrines, hidden in the past.
campaign.duel_17_post_3: "Seal the five elements, and Zhang Jue's power will crumble. The rift in time will answer your call."
campaign.story_return_1: The time rift reopens with a sound like breaking glass. You step through.
campaign.story_return_2: The Sanguo era greets you — but changed. The Yellow Turbans have spread like plague across the land.
campaign.story_return_3: Old allies stand in your path. They do not fight you out of malice — they fight to test your resolve.
campaign.story_return_4: Prove your strength has grown. The shrines await.
campaign.duel_31_pre_1: So... you have gathered the five elements. Water. Wood. Earth. Metal. Fire.
campaign.duel_31_pre_2: But the path of the Wu-Xing does not end with mastery. It ends with transcendence.
campaign.duel_31_pre_3: I am the space between the elements. Face me — or turn back forever.
campaign.duel_31_post_1: The five seals shatter in brilliant light. Zhang Jue's barrier weakens across the land.
campaign.duel_31_post_2: But in the fading light, you glimpse a figure watching from the shadows. A familiar silhouette...
campaign.story_betrayal_1: The camp is silent. Too silent.
campaign.story_betrayal_2: Did you really think the son of Cao would bow to a nameless scholar?
campaign.story_betrayal_3: Zhang Jue promised me the throne — the entire Middle Kingdom. All I had to do was keep you distracted.
campaign.story_betrayal_4: Every battle, every alliance — a lie. And you walked right into it.
campaign.story_betrayal_5: The betrayal cuts deeper than any blade. There is no one left to trust.
campaign.duel_32_post_1: Cao Pi falls to his knees, defeated. But he laughs — a hollow, broken sound.
campaign.duel_32_post_2: It doesn't matter. The ritual is already complete. Lu Bu stirs in his tomb.
campaign.duel_32_post_3: A tremor shakes the earth. Something ancient and terrible is waking.
campaign.duel_35_post_1: Zhang Jue crumbles. His Yellow Sky fades to nothing. But his final words are a curse.
campaign.duel_35_post_2: Too late... the Invincible Warrior has already risen. Not even I can stop him now.
campaign.duel_35_post_3: The ground splits open. A figure climbs from the abyss — Lu Bu, reborn.
campaign.story_alliance_1: The impossible happens. Cao Pi appears at your side — battered, humbled, afraid.
campaign.story_alliance_2: Lu Bu serves no master. Not Zhang Jue. Not my father. No one. If he rises fully... none of us survive.
campaign.story_alliance_3: I am not asking for forgiveness. I am asking for survival.
campaign.story_alliance_4: A fragile alliance, forged in desperation. The final battle begins.
campaign.duel_37_post_1: Lu Bu staggers — but does not fall. A terrible sound splits the air: hooves.
campaign.duel_37_post_2: From the darkness, Chituma charges forth. Rider and steed merge into one — a being of pure, unstoppable destruction.
campaign.duel_38_post_1: Lu Bu falls at last. The earth stops trembling. Silence returns to the battlefield.
campaign.duel_38_post_2: Then — slow, deliberate clapping. A figure emerges from the shadows.
campaign.duel_38_post_3: Magnificent. You have eliminated every obstacle in my path. The throne is mine.
campaign.duel_39_post_1: Cao Cao — the man behind it all. The puppet master. He falls.
campaign.duel_39_post_2: The echoes of the Three Kingdoms grow quiet. The cards dim in your hands, their purpose fulfilled.
campaign.duel_39_post_3: Peace settles over the land like the first snow of winter. The wars are over.
campaign.duel_39_post_4: Your legend will echo through the ages... Wolong.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.goal_text: Reduce your opponent's Life Points (LP) to 0. Each player starts with 8000 LP and a deck of cards.
howToPlay.phases_text: Each turn has 3 phases: Main Phase (summon monsters, set spells/traps), Battle Phase (attack with monsters), and End Phase. Press B to enter Battle, E to End, T to pass the turn.
howToPlay.fusion_text: Long-press monsters in your hand to select them for fusion. If a valid fusion exists, you can fuse them into a stronger monster. Fusion consumes the material cards.
howToPlay.spells_text: Spells activate immediately. Traps can be set face-down and activated when your opponent attacks. Equipment cards boost a monster's ATK or DEF.

error.title: An error has occurred
error.save_failed: Save failed — storage may be full.

migration.warning_text: Your old save data was updated to a new format. A backup of your previous data has been preserved. If something looks wrong, you can restore the backup from Options.

duelResult.victory_message: Your forces have triumphed! Glory echoes across the land...
duelResult.defeat_message: Your forces have fallen. But every warrior can rise again...
duelResult.win_reason_lp: Opponent's life points were reduced to 0.
duelResult.win_reason_deckout: Opponent's deck ran out of cards.
duelResult.loss_reason_lp: Your life points were reduced to 0.
duelResult.loss_reason_deckout: Your deck ran out of cards.

effectText.trigger_onSummon_tip: Activates when this monster is summoned to the field
effectText.trigger_onDestroyByBattle_tip: Activates when this monster is destroyed in battle
effectText.trigger_onDestroyByOpponent_tip: Activates when this monster is destroyed by the opponent
effectText.trigger_passive_tip: Always active while this monster is face-up on the field
effectText.trigger_onFlipSummon_tip: Activates when this face-down monster is flip summoned
effectText.trigger_onFlip_tip: Activates when this face-down monster is flipped face-up
effectText.trigger_onDealBattleDamage_tip: Activates when this monster deals battle damage to the opponent
effectText.trigger_onSentToGrave_tip: Activates when this monster is sent to the Graveyard
effectText.trigger_onAttack_tip: Activates when the opponent declares an attack
effectText.trigger_onOwnMonsterAttacked_tip: Activates when one of your monsters is attacked
effectText.trigger_onOpponentSummon_tip: Activates when the opponent summons a monster
effectText.trigger_manual_tip: Can be activated manually during your turn
effectText.trigger_onOpponentSpell_tip: Activates when the opponent activates a spell card
effectText.trigger_onAnySummon_tip: Activates when any player summons a monster
effectText.trigger_onOpponentTrap_tip: Activates when the opponent activates a trap card
effectText.cost_tip: This cost must be paid to activate the effect
effectText.action_dealDamage_tip: Inflicts effect damage to the target's LP
effectText.action_draw_tip: Draw cards from the top of the Deck
effectText.action_buffField_tip: Permanently boosts ATK and DEF of your monsters
effectText.action_tempBuffField: All your monsters gain +{{value}} ATK/DEF this turn
effectText.action_tempBuffField_tip: Temporarily boosts ATK and DEF until end of turn
effectText.action_debuffField: All opponent monsters lose {{atk}} ATK / {{def}} DEF
effectText.action_debuffField_tip: Permanently reduces ATK and DEF of opponent's monsters
effectText.action_tempDebuffField: All opponent monsters lose {{atk}} ATK this turn
effectText.action_tempDebuffField_both: All opponent monsters lose {{atk}} ATK / {{def}} DEF this turn
effectText.action_tempDebuffField_tip: Temporarily reduces stats until end of turn
effectText.action_bounceStrongestOpp: Return opponent's strongest monster to hand
effectText.action_bounceStrongestOpp_tip: Returns the opponent's highest-ATK monster to their hand
effectText.action_bounceAttacker_tip: Returns the attacking monster to its owner's hand
effectText.action_bounceAllOppMonsters: Return all opponent monsters to hand
effectText.action_bounceAllOppMonsters_tip: Returns all opponent monsters to their hand
effectText.action_searchDeckToHand: Search Deck and add 1 card to hand
effectText.action_searchDeckToHand_filtered: Search Deck for a {{filter}} and add to hand
effectText.action_searchDeckToHand_tip: Searches the Deck for a matching card
effectText.action_tempAtkBonus_tip: Temporarily modifies ATK until end of turn
effectText.action_tempDefBonus_tip: Temporarily modifies DEF until end of turn
effectText.action_reviveFromGrave: Special Summon a monster from your Graveyard
effectText.action_reviveFromGrave_tip: Revives a monster from your Graveyard to the field
effectText.action_reviveFromEitherGrave: Special Summon a monster from either Graveyard
effectText.action_reviveFromEitherGrave_tip: Revives a monster from either player's Graveyard
effectText.action_cancelAttack_tip: Stops the current attack from resolving
effectText.action_cancelEffect_tip: Prevents the triggered effect from resolving
effectText.action_destroySummonedIf_tip: Destroys the just-summoned monster if its ATK meets the threshold
effectText.action_destroyAllOpp_tip: Destroys every monster on the opponent's field
effectText.action_destroyAll: Destroy all monsters on the field
effectText.action_destroyAll_tip: Destroys every monster on both sides of the field
effectText.action_sendTopCardsToGrave: Send top {{count}} card(s) of your Deck to Graveyard
effectText.action_sendTopCardsToGrave_tip: Mills cards from the top of your Deck
effectText.action_sendTopCardsToGraveOpp: Send top {{count}} card(s) of opponent's Deck to Graveyard
effectText.action_sendTopCardsToGraveOpp_tip: Mills cards from the top of the opponent's Deck
effectText.action_salvageFromGrave: Add 1 monster from Graveyard to hand
effectText.action_salvageFromGrave_tip: Recovers a card from the Graveyard to your hand
effectText.action_recycleFromGraveToDeck: Return 1 card from Graveyard to Deck
effectText.action_recycleFromGraveToDeck_tip: Shuffles a card from the Graveyard back into the Deck
effectText.action_shuffleGraveIntoDeck_tip: Returns all cards in the Graveyard to the Deck
effectText.action_shuffleDeck_tip: Randomizes the order of cards in the Deck
effectText.action_peekTopCard: Peek at top card of Deck
effectText.action_peekTopCard_tip: Reveals the top card of your Deck
effectText.action_specialSummonFromHand: Special Summon a monster from hand
effectText.action_specialSummonFromHand_tip: Summons a monster from hand without using your normal summon
effectText.action_specialSummonFromDeck: Special Summon a monster from Deck
effectText.action_specialSummonFromDeck_tip: Summons a monster directly from the Deck
effectText.action_discardFromHand_tip: Forces you to discard cards from your hand
effectText.action_discardOppHand_tip: Forces the opponent to discard cards
effectText.action_discardEntireHand_both: Both players discard their entire hand
effectText.action_passive_piercing_tip: Excess battle damage is dealt to the opponent's LP when attacking a DEF position monster
effectText.action_passive_untargetable_tip: This monster cannot be selected as a target for card effects
effectText.action_passive_directAttack_tip: This monster can attack the opponent's LP directly
effectText.action_passive_vsAttrBonus_tip: Gains bonus ATK when battling monsters of a specific attribute
effectText.action_passive_phoenixRevival_tip: When destroyed, this monster returns to the field once
effectText.action_passive_indestructible_tip: This monster survives battle even when outmatched
effectText.action_passive_effectImmune_tip: This monster is unaffected by card effects
effectText.action_passive_cantBeAttacked_tip: Opponent cannot select this monster as an attack target
effectText.action_passive_negateTraps_tip: While face-up, opponent's trap cards are negated
effectText.action_passive_negateSpells_tip: While face-up, opponent's spell cards are negated
effectText.action_passive_negateMonsterEffects_tip: While face-up, opponent's monster effects are negated
effectText.action_destroyOppSpellTrap_tip: Destroys one spell or trap on the opponent's field
effectText.action_destroyAllOppSpellTraps_tip: Destroys every spell and trap on the opponent's field
effectText.action_destroyAllSpellTraps: Destroy all spells/traps on the field
effectText.action_destroyAllSpellTraps_tip: Destroys every spell and trap on both sides of the field
effectText.action_destroyOppFieldSpell_tip: Destroys the opponent's active field spell
effectText.action_changePositionOpp_tip: Switches an opponent monster between ATK and DEF position
effectText.action_setFaceDown_tip: Flips a monster into face-down DEF position
effectText.action_flipAllOppFaceDown_tip: Flips all opponent monsters into face-down DEF position
effectText.action_reflectBattleDamage_tip: Battle damage you would take is dealt to the opponent instead
effectText.action_stealMonster_tip: Permanently takes control of one of the opponent's monsters
effectText.action_stealMonsterTemp: Temporarily take control of opponent's monster
effectText.action_stealMonsterTemp_tip: Takes control of an opponent's monster for one turn
effectText.action_skipOppDraw_tip: The opponent will not draw a card during their next Draw Phase
effectText.action_destroyAndDamageBoth: Destroy opponent's monster and deal its ATK as damage
effectText.action_destroyAndDamageBoth_tip: Destroys a monster and deals damage equal to its ATK
effectText.action_preventBattleDamage: Prevent all battle damage this turn
effectText.action_preventBattleDamage_tip: No battle damage is taken this turn
effectText.action_drawThenDiscard_tip: Draws cards then forces you to discard
effectText.action_bounceOppHandToDeck: Shuffle {{count}} card(s) from opponent's hand into Deck
effectText.action_bounceOppHandToDeck_tip: Forces the opponent to return cards from hand to Deck
effectText.action_tributeSelf_tip: Sends this monster to the Graveyard as a cost
effectText.action_preventAttacks_tip: Opponent cannot declare attacks for the specified turns
effectText.action_createTokens_tip: Creates token monsters on your field
effectText.action_gameReset_tip: Resets both players' LP and fields
effectText.action_excavateAndSummon: Reveal top {{count}} card(s), summon 1 monster (Level {{maxLevel}} or lower)
effectText.action_excavateAndSummon_tip: Reveals cards from the top of the Deck and summons an eligible monster

controller.test_prompt: Connect a controller and press any button to test
